name: Mistral 7B
archDisplay: Dense transformer — 32 layers, grouped-query attention + sliding-window attention
note: Debut open 7.3B model; Apache-2.0 weights beat Llama 2 13B on most benchmarks and launched Mistral AI.

results.notes: Table 2 of the Mistral 7B paper, Pretrained row (fetched via ar5iv HTML mirror and cross-checked against raw arxiv text).
Table 2 of the Mistral 7B paper (Arc-e column), Pretrained row.
Table 2 of the Mistral 7B paper (TriviaQA column), Pretrained row.
EU21-MMLU, Thellmann et al. 2024, Table 13 ('Mistral-7B-v0.1', base checkpoint). Matches this catalog entry's linked mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1 exactly.

HF Open LLM Leaderboard v2 automated eval run of mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1 (bfloat16, the exact HF repo this catalog record links to); IFEval normalized score. Distinct from the paper-reported Table-2 figures already tracked.
HF Open LLM Leaderboard v2 automated eval run of mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1; BBH normalized score. [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 22.02 -> 44.23]

HF Open LLM Leaderboard v2 automated eval run of mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1; GPQA (chance-corrected) normalized score. Matches the ~5.16-5.59 range shown in the HF model-card auto-eval widget. [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 5.59 -> 5.16]
HF Open LLM Leaderboard v2 automated eval run of mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1; MMLU-PRO normalized score. Distinct benchmark from the plain 'mmlu' slug already tracked (paper-reported 60.1).

verificationNotes: Existence and identity confirmed: mistral.ai/news/announcing-mistral-7b/ and HF mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1 card (magnet-link release 2023-09-27, Apache-2.0, 7B params ~7.3B per architecture config, GQA+SWA, 32 layers). All 8 benchmark rows confirmed literally in arxiv 2310.06825 Table 2 (fetched via ar5iv HTML mirror): MMLU 60.1, HellaSwag 81.3, WinoGrande 75.3, ARC-C 55.5, GSM8K 52.2, MATH 13.1, HumanEval 30.5, MBPP 47.5 — no changes. 8K context confirmed specific to v0.1 (docs page for v0.3 shows 32K, a later variant, so ctxK=8 for this v0.1 record is correct, not an error). Pricing $0.25/$0.25 and retirement date 2025-03-30 for open-mistral-7b corroborated by Microsoft Foundry retirement-schedule listing and Helicone pricing page.
